overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking along a lakeside wooden dock at night, then transitioning through a garden terrace and up a cobblestone path toward a distant illuminated castle. The scene features atmospheric teal night lighting and moves from open waterfront to enclosed garden to structured pathway.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden dock extending over mountain lake

events.description: character reaches end of dock, turns around and walks back toward shore
approaching stone terrace with ornate columns and fire braziers

agents.ego_description: Geralt walks along the wooden dock, pauses at the end to look at the water and mountains, then turns back toward the shore

entered.detail: weathered wooden planks forming a pier over the water
calm reflective water surface surrounding the dock
dark silhouetted mountains against the night sky
ornate stone platform with classical columns visible at the shore

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks along a wooden dock extending over a calm mountain lake at night. The open sky shows teal-tinged clouds, and mountains rise in the distance. After reaching the end of the dock, he turns and walks back toward a stone terrace structure visible on the shore.

scene_state.functional_zone: garden terrace with stone columns transitioning to wooded path

events.description: exits wooden dock and enters stone terrace area with ornate columns
leaves stone terrace and enters garden area with trees and grass

agents.ego_description: Geralt walks up stone steps from the dock, passes through a columned terrace with fire braziers, and continues into a garden path surrounded by dense trees

entered.detail: dense canopy of trees surrounding the path
low stone wall running alongside the garden path

segments.scene_description: Leaving the dock behind, Geralt enters a stone terrace with ornate columns and burning braziers, then transitions into a garden area with dense trees and grass underfoot. The environment becomes more enclosed as he moves away from the open water into the tree cover.

scene_state.functional_zone: cobblestone path with lamp posts leading to castle

events.description: transitions from grass and dirt to cobblestone path
passes lit lamp posts that add warm light to the scene

agents.ego_description: Geralt walks steadily along a cobblestone path toward the distant castle, passing stone walls, wooden fences, and illuminated lamp posts

entered.detail: worn cobblestone road winding toward the castle
large illuminated stone castle with multiple spires and towers
tall stone pillars with warm glowing lights
wooden railing along the right side of the path

segments.scene_description: The path becomes a structured cobblestone road as Geralt approaches the castle. Lit lamp posts line the left side of the path, casting warm light, while a wooden fence runs along the right. The castle grows larger and more detailed as he continues walking toward it.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from an open, moonlit waterfront into the structured approach of a fortified castle. It begins with Geralt walking along a wooden dock over a calm mountain lake under teal-tinged clouds before he turns back toward the shore. As he leaves the dock, the scene shifts into a stone terrace with ornate columns and burning braziers, moving further inland into an enclosed garden area shaded by dense trees. The environment then opens up as the grassy terrain gives way to a structured cobblestone road lined with warm lamp posts and a wooden fence. Finally, the camera follows the path forward as the distant castle grows larger and more detailed in the night air.
